name: Analysing Moral Bias in Finetuned LLMs through Mechanistic Interpretability
summary: arXiv:2510.12229v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have been shown to internalize human-like biases during finetuning, yet the mechanisms by which these biases m...
description: arXiv:2510.12229v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have been shown to internalize human-like biases during finetuning, yet the mechanisms by which these biases manifest remain unclear. In this work, we investigated whether the well-known Knobe effect, a moral bias in intentionality judgements, emerges in finetuned LLMs and whether it can be traced back to spe...
author: Bianca Raimondi, Daniela Dalbagno, Maurizio Gabbrielli
